principle: Stay free or near-free until validation gates prove demand.

tools.name: Tally
tools.freeUse: Camper waitlist, host interest, road-stop lead, safety survey
tools.upgradeTrigger: Need custom domain, team collaboration, data retention controls, or email verification.

tools.name: Airtable Free
tools.freeUse: Research OS, host leads, road-stop leads, validation pipeline, content tracker
tools.upgradeTrigger: Record limits, automations, interfaces, or team workflow complexity.

tools.name: Brevo Free
tools.freeUse: The Campfire newsletter, welcome sequence, consented list management
tools.upgradeTrigger: Daily send cap, Brevo branding, advanced automation, deliverability controls.

tools.name: Notion Free
tools.freeUse: Operating docs, founder notes, meeting notes, publishing calendar
tools.upgradeTrigger: Team permissions, guests, advanced collaboration, larger file workflows.

tools.name: Google Drive
tools.freeUse: Host photos, route proof, permission notes, outreach assets
tools.upgradeTrigger: Need app-integrated uploads or signed storage URLs.

tools.name: Google Search Console
tools.freeUse: Search indexing and query monitoring after launch
tools.upgradeTrigger: No paid upgrade required; add specialist SEO tools only after traffic exists.

tools.name: Codex Automations
tools.freeUse: Weekly intelligence, validation review, host enrichment, SEO briefs, newsletter draft, UX QA
tools.upgradeTrigger: Need external API integrations or CI/CD scheduling.
